items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you want to buy an ice cream or some bubble gum?
• Do you want to sell your bicycle?
• Do you need to work downtown today?
• 21- Do you buy ice cream every day? / candy / chocolate.
• 23- What do you want to buy now? / eat / drink.

items.text: Do you want to buy an ice cream or some bubble gum?
Do you want to sell your bicycle?
Do you need to work downtown today?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Hoje as crianças vestem roupas verdes
Choose the English sentence for: Quando as crianças esquecem de vestir verde,
options: When children forget to wear green,
When children forget to wear green, 2.
When children forget to wear green, 3.
green, wear to forget children When

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: “In 1492 Columbus sailed the ocean blue”.

items.answer: 21- Do you buy ice cream every day? / candy / chocolate.
23- What do you want to buy now? / eat / drink.
